prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Major Depressive Disorder
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily), Letrozole (2.5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 76.5 kg; Height 158.4 cm; BMI 30.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.3%; 9 months ago 6.7%; 6 months ago 6.4%; 3 months ago 6.0%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 194mg/dL; 9 months ago 169mg/dL; 6 months ago 152mg/dL; 3 months ago 113mg/dL; current 117mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 76.1kg; 9 months ago 75.3kg; 6 months ago 73.9kg; 3 months ago 73.9kg; current 76.5kg), Height (12 months ago 158.4cm; 9 months ago 158.4cm; 6 months ago 158.4cm; 3 months ago 158.4cm; current 158.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 124mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 21U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 22U/L), AST (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 20U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 45mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; current 41mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 128mg/g; 9 months ago 156mg/g; 6 months ago 114mg/g; 3 months ago 141mg/g; current 126mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 97mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 36mg/dL; 9 months ago 34mg/dL; 6 months ago 33mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 35mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 161mg/dL; 9 months ago 179mg/dL; 6 months ago 179mg/dL; 3 months ago 179mg/dL; current 169mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.8g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
